episodes.title: Epstein's Insane Online Footprint
episodes.description:
After being released from his first jail sentence, Epstein turned to the online world in an attempt to suppress and silence any articles or reports made about his criminal activity. Leading to more and more of his involvement in social media websites, and a company known as Aviloop.

episodes.title: Joan Ocean & The Crazy Hippie Dolphin Cult
episodes.description:
For over 40 years, a bizarre Hawaiian dolphin cult has remained relatively unknown. Led by a woman named Joan Ocean, the group believes in ufos, aliens, bigfoot, Atlantis, and so much more that we cover later in this video. Hope you enjoy!
